recommendations.title: S.F.W.
recommendations.overview: An alienated and misanthropic teenager gains sudden and unwanted celebrity status after he's taken hostage by terrorists where his indifference to their threats to kill him makes news headlines.

recommendations.title: The Death of Dick Long
recommendations.overview: Dick died last night, and Zeke and Earl don’t want anybody finding out how. That’s too bad though, cause news travels fast in small-town Alabama.

recommendations.title: Mario
recommendations.overview: Two young gay soccer players get caught up between the politics of the game and the politics of love.

recommendations.title: School Is Over
recommendations.overview: Agathe Langlois, Parisian until the end of the nails well varnishes, is delighted: she is going to be confirmed as a professor of English. The happiness of the good news will not last as she learns that she is deployed to the countryside.

recommendations.title: Broadcast News
recommendations.overview: A high-strung news producer finds herself in a love triangle between a talented but self-doubting reporter and a charming news anchor who embodies the growing trivialization of news that she is determined to fight against.

recommendations.title: Wake of Death
recommendations.overview: Ben Archer, an ex-mob enforcer, seeks revenge against a ruthless Chinese kingpin responsible for his wife's brutal murder. When Archer joins forces with his old underworld friends, an all-out war is waged against the Chinese Triad.

recommendations.title: Made in Abyss: Wandering Twilight
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Mystery, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Second compilation movie of the TV series which covers episodes 9-13. Riko and Reg descend to the third and fourth layer where Riko has her first experience of the Curse.

recommendations.title: Rapture-Palooza
recommendations.overview: Two teens battle their way through a religious apocalypse on a mission to defeat the Antichrist.

recommendations.title: Good Sam
recommendations.overview: A news reporter looks into who has been anonymously leaving large cash gifts on random doorsteps in New York.

recommendations.title: Morning Glory
recommendations.overview: A young and devoted morning television producer is hired as an executive producer on a  long-running morning show at a once-prominent but currently failing station in New York City. Eager to keep the show on air, she recruits a former news journalist
